facts.context:
Q: PageRank's stationary distribution π_i is mathematically equivalent to which thermodynamic quantity?
A:
distractors: Gibbs free energy minimization at constant pressure
Entropy production rate in irreversible processes
Heat capacity at constant volume (Cv = dU/dT)

facts.context:
Q: The PageRank damping factor (1-α) teleportation term corresponds to what in statistical mechanics?
A:
facts.truth: External driving that breaks detailed balance (nonequilibrium forcing)
distractors: Boltzmann constant k relating temperature to energy
Degeneracy factor g counting microstates per energy
